query:
SELECT pm.id, pm.slug, pm.hero_image_url, 
       COUNT(DISTINCT pmg.id) as gallery_count,
       COUNT(DISTINCT pmv.id) as video_count
FROM project_media pm
LEFT JOIN project_media_gallery pmg ON pmg.project_media_id = pm.id
LEFT JOIN project_media_videos pmv ON pmv.project_media_id = pm.id
WHERE pm.slug = 'lexus-of-las-vegas'
GROUP BY pm.id, pm.slug, pm.hero_image_url;
